description: Golden eval dataset — 100 representative job postings for consistent benchmarking. Covers true positives, wrong function, wrong location, too-junior, not-a-job, and borderline cases. Real failures from production eval are marked source=real.
profile_snapshot: Senior PM 15+ yrs, Munich, B2C + developer tools, remote/hybrid EU

jobs.title: Rovo Dev
jobs.job_description: AI-powered. Developer-led. Rovo Dev reduces friction across the entire software delivery lifecycle. Available in your terminal, IDE, and beyond. Try it now. Rovo Dev is Atlassian's AI-powered developer tool that helps engineers write, review, and ship code faster. It integrates with your existing workflow and understands your codebase. Sign up for early access today.

ground_truth.notes: Product marketing page, not a job listing. Agent scored 86 — major false positive.

jobs.title: Engineering careers
jobs.job_description: Careers. Browse Jobs. Our Teams. Engineering. AI and Machine Learning. Sales. All Teams. Early Careers. Team Experience. Team Anywhere. Team Everyone. Employee Awards. Candidate Resources. Tips for Applying. Interviewing. Career Growth. Benefits and Perks. Talent Community. Awards. Join the Atlassian team and help build products used by millions of developers worldwide.

ground_truth.notes: Navigation/careers landing page, not a specific job. Agent scored 64.

jobs.title: Job Application for Engineering Manager
jobs.job_description: Engineering Manager - Code Plane [M3] Remote. Who we are: Everything is changing in how software gets built, and Sourcegraph is at the center of that transformation. With Code Search, Deep Search, and MCP, Sourcegraph is the world's most powerful code intelligence platform. Teams at Stripe, Uber, and Dropbox rely on Sourcegraph. We're backed by a16z, Sequoia, and Redpoint. Working hours must overlap with EST for at least 20 hours/week. Preferred locations: North America (EST), Europe, South America. Why this job is exciting: You will manage a team of 6-8 engineers working on our core code intelligence plane. You will set technical direction, run hiring loops, conduct performance reviews, and partner with product managers. Requirements: 3+ years engineering management experience, strong technical background in distributed systems, proven track record of growing engineers. You will own team health, delivery, and cross-functional alignment.

ground_truth.notes: Engineering Manager role — engineering, not PM. Agent scored 85.

jobs.title: Job Application for Security Engineer [IC3] at Sourcegraph
jobs.job_description: Security Engineer [IC3] Remote. Who we are: Sourcegraph is the world's most powerful code intelligence platform. Why this job is exciting: As a Security Engineer, you will design and implement security controls across our cloud infrastructure, conduct threat modeling, perform security reviews of new features, respond to security incidents, and build tooling to detect and prevent vulnerabilities. You will work with engineering teams to embed security into the SDLC. Requirements: 3+ years security engineering experience, proficiency in Go or Python, experience with cloud security (AWS/GCP), knowledge of OWASP, threat modeling, penetration testing. Preferred locations: Europe.

ground_truth.notes: Security Engineer — engineering, not PM. Agent scored 75.

jobs.title: Job Application for Regional Sales Director [M4] at Sourcegraph
jobs.job_description: Regional Sales Director [M4] Remote. Who we are: Sourcegraph is the world's most powerful code intelligence platform. Why this job is exciting: As a Regional Sales Director, you will own a territory of enterprise accounts across North America, build and manage a team of Account Executives, develop regional go-to-market strategies, and drive revenue growth. You will partner with marketing, solutions engineering, and customer success. Requirements: Must reside in the United States. 5+ years enterprise software sales, 2+ years sales management, track record of exceeding quota, experience selling to engineering or DevOps teams.

ground_truth.notes: Sales Director — wrong function AND requires US residency. Agent scored high.

jobs.title: Job Application for Distribution Partner Manager at Figma
jobs.job_description: Distribution Partner Manager. San Francisco, CA • New York, NY • United States. Figma's distribution partnerships team is passionate about unlocking new sources of revenue through strategic alliances. We are looking for an experienced business development and partnerships professional to scale our efforts with agencies, systems integrators, consultancies, and commercial partners across the globe. This includes driving revenue growth and supporting customers across North America. Requirements: 7+ years in partnerships or business development, experience working with channel partners or resellers, strong commercial acumen, ability to travel frequently across North America. Based in SF or NYC required.

ground_truth.notes: US-only (SF/NY), business development role. Agent scored 80.

jobs.title: Job Application for Distribution Partner Manager (Singapore) at Figma
jobs.job_description: Distribution Partner Manager (Singapore). Singapore. Figma's distribution partnerships team is focused on unlocking new sources of revenue through strategic alliances. We are looking for an experienced business development and partnerships professional to scale our efforts with agencies, systems integrators, consultancies, and commercial partners across APAC. This includes driving revenue growth and supporting customers in India, SE Asia, South Korea, and ANZ. Requirements: 7+ years in partnerships or business development in APAC, fluency in English required, additional Asian language a plus, based in Singapore required.

ground_truth.notes: Singapore location. Agent scored 97 — worst false positive in dataset.

jobs.title: Job Application for Product Partner Manager at Figma
jobs.job_description: Product Partner Manager. San Francisco, CA • New York, NY • United States. Figma's Business Development & Partnerships team accelerates company goals by working with partners to enhance product experiences, expand our ecosystem, and drive user and revenue growth. As our product portfolio and user base continue to evolve, the team plays a critical role connecting our platform to a broader network of builders, developers, and solution partners. We're looking for someone to build the partnerships foundation for our newest product surfaces. Requirements: Based in SF or NYC. 5+ years in partnerships, strong product intuition, experience with API ecosystems.

ground_truth.notes: US-only (SF/NY). Partnership role, not PM. Agent scored high.

jobs.title: Job Application for Director, Monetization Strategy at Figma
jobs.job_description: Director, Monetization Strategy. San Francisco, CA • New York, NY • United States. Monetization strategy has become one of the most important areas of our business. As Director, Monetization Strategy on our Business Operations team, you'll set and drive Figma's monetization strategy across pricing, packaging, our AI credit model, and the evolution of our business model. You'll lead a small, high-leverage team and quarterback decisions reaching the CFO, CPO, and CEO. This is a role for a broad, strategic operator. Requirements: Based in SF or NYC. 10+ years in strategy or business operations, strong financial modeling, experience at a high-growth SaaS company.

ground_truth.notes: US-only (SF/NY). Strategy/BizOps, not PM. High scorer due to product context.

jobs.title: Job Application for Governance Risk and Compliance at Figma
jobs.job_description: Governance Risk and Compliance. San Francisco, CA • New York, NY • United States. Figma's GRC team helps build and maintain trust with users, regulators, and business partners. We partner across the company to strengthen security, manage risk, maintain compliance, and scale programs that support continued growth. We're growing our team and looking for security, risk, and compliance professionals across several disciplines — compliance, risk management, governance, GRC tooling, or customer trust. Requirements: Based in SF or NYC. 5+ years in GRC or compliance, experience with SOC 2, ISO 27001, or similar frameworks.

ground_truth.notes: GRC/compliance role AND US-only. Completely wrong function.

jobs.title: Job Application for AI
jobs.job_description: AI-Enabled Revenue Operations Specialist (F/M/D). Munich Hybrid. THE OPPORTUNITY: The way B2B revenue teams operate is fundamentally reshaped by AI. We're building a Revenue Operations function designed for this moment. As our AI-Enabled Revenue Operations Specialist, you will own three interconnected missions: Revenue Insights & Reporting (build AI-enhanced analytics across the full funnel), Workflow Design & Optimization (redesign how revenue teams work together from lead to opportunity to customer), and Tooling & Automation (identify and implement AI tools). Requirements: 3+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Operations, experience with CRM systems (Salesforce), strong analytical skills, SQL knowledge a plus.

ground_truth.notes: RevOps role but title is just "Job Application for AI" — WRONG_FUNCTION only checks title. LLM should score low.

jobs.title: Job Application for Business Development Specialist (Polish speaking) (F/M/D) at NavVis
jobs.job_description: Business Development Specialist (Polish speaking) (F/M/D). Poland Remote. THE OPPORTUNITY: Are you ready to launch your sales career in a fast-growing international tech company? At NavVis, we need a passionate Business Development Specialist to help scale our presence in the Poland market. In this role you will build a sales pipeline in the Poland region, prospect and qualify leads in construction, surveying, and engineering industries, and work with Account Executives and Customer Success Managers. Requirements: Native or fluent Polish speaker required. 1-2 years sales or business development experience. Ideally based in Poland.

ground_truth.notes: BDS/sales role in Poland requiring Polish. Wrong function + wrong location. Agent scored 90.

jobs.title: Job Application for Cloud Engineer (F/M/D) at NavVis
jobs.job_description: Cloud Engineer (F/M/D). Munich Hybrid. THE OPPORTUNITY: Play a key role in the development of our pioneering browser-based 3D application that produces high-quality photorealistic digital twins. You'll join our dynamic cloud team working on the platform that supports NavVis IVION. HOW YOU WILL MAKE AN IMPACT: Developing and operating applications on Kubernetes using Infrastructure-as-Code via Terraform, Helm and ArgoCD. Building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines. Driving cloud cost optimization. Requirements: 3+ years cloud engineering experience, expertise in Kubernetes and Terraform, proficiency in Go or Python, experience with AWS or GCP.

ground_truth.notes: Cloud Engineer — wrong function. Munich hybrid is fine but role is engineering.

jobs.title: Job Application for Cloud Platform Product Manager (F/M/D) at NavVis
jobs.job_description: Cloud Platform Product Manager (F/M/D). Munich Hybrid. OUR VISION: When people use our technology to bridge the gap between the physical and digital worlds, they don't just capture reality — they create a new one. THE OPPORTUNITY: Does the opportunity to shape the future of NavVis Cloud, the platform powering our enterprise SaaS products, appeal to you? In this role you will work closely with platform and backend engineers, product managers, and business operations teams to define and drive the roadmap for NavVis Cloud (NVC). You will play a key role in scaling our cloud-based platform that enables NavVis products to be deployed and operated efficiently across thousands of customer environments. Requirements: 5+ years product management experience with cloud or SaaS platforms, ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders, experience with agile delivery. Fluent English required.

ground_truth.notes: TRUE POSITIVE — only correct match in production eval. PM role at Munich hybrid company. Agent scored only 60 (below threshold 70), suggesting LLM underscored it.

jobs.title: NavVis Employee Spotlight: Moritz Pfeiffer, Finance Team Lead
jobs.job_description: Kourtney Kirton, Jun 6 2023, 8 min read. NavVis Employee Spotlight: Moritz Pfeiffer, Finance Team Lead. Meet our Finance Team Lead, Moritz Pfeiffer, and learn about his journey at NavVis, what he enjoys most about working here, and his advice for candidates. Moritz joined NavVis three years ago after working at a Big Four accounting firm. He leads a team of five finance professionals and is passionate about building scalable financial processes as the company grows.

ground_truth.notes: Blog post / employee spotlight — not a job listing. Agent scored 75.

jobs.title: Early Career
jobs.job_description: Early Career — DFT Engineer (M, F, D). Munich, Bavaria-Bayern, Germany. Hardware. Summary: Imagine what you could do here. At Apple, new insights have a way of becoming extraordinary products very quickly. Do you enjoy working on challenges that no one has solved yet? We are searching for a passionate engineer to join our team redefining hardware technology. As a DFT (Design For Testability) Engineer, you will develop test strategies for cutting-edge silicon, implement scan insertion and ATPG flows, collaborate with design teams to ensure testability. Requirements: BS/MS in Electrical Engineering or Computer Science, knowledge of VLSI design and digital logic, experience with DFT methodologies preferred, this is an early career position — 0-2 years experience.

ground_truth.notes: Early career (title starts with 'Early Career') AND wrong function (hardware engineer). Agent scored 80.

jobs.title: Director Fleet Intelligence & AI (m/f/d)
jobs.job_description: Director Fleet Intelligence & AI (m/f/d). TECH & Engineering. Full-time. Munich, Germany. The role of Director Fleet Intelligence & AI is a unique opportunity to make significant business impact at SIXT. You will be responsible for leading a team of data scientists and engineers to develop AI models that optimize our global fleet of 200,000+ vehicles. This includes predictive maintenance, demand forecasting, vehicle allocation optimization, and real-time fleet tracking. You will own the product and technical roadmap for fleet intelligence, define OKRs, and present results to the C-suite. Requirements: 8+ years in data science or AI/ML leadership, experience managing cross-functional engineering teams, strong background in operations research or logistics optimization, PhD preferred.

ground_truth.notes: Fleet Intelligence AI Director — title does not match WRONG_FUNCTION regex. LLM should score low (operations/ML director, not PM).

jobs.title: Schadensjurist (m/w/d)
jobs.job_description: Schadensjurist (m/w/d). Law & Taxes. Full-time. Munich, Germany. Sie brennen für Verkehrsrecht und lieben es, komplexe Schadensfälle strategisch zu lösen? Als Schadensjurist bei SIXT steuern Sie die rechtliche Bearbeitung von Kfz-Schadensfällen, verhandeln mit Versicherungen und gegnerischen Anwälten, und vertreten SIXT in streitigen Verfahren. Sie arbeiten eng mit unseren Flotten- und Kundencenter-Teams zusammen. Anforderungen: Volljurist (2. Staatsexamen), Spezialisierung im Verkehrs- oder Versicherungsrecht, 2+ Jahre Berufserfahrung als Rechtsanwalt oder Syndikusrechtsanwalt, Deutsch auf muttersprachlichem Niveau.

ground_truth.notes: Legal/lawyer role (Jurist). Explicitly in WRONG_FUNCTION regex. Agent scored 80.

jobs.title: Director Accounting North America (m/f/d)

The Director Accounting North America takes on a pivotal role overseeing all US and Canadian accounting operations from our Munich headquarters. You will manage month-end close, ensure GAAP and IFRS compliance, lead a team of 8 accountants, drive process automation, and serve as the primary contact for US auditors. ground_truth.notes: Accounting Director — completely wrong function. Despite Munich location, agent scored 90.

jobs.title: People Analytics Graduated Internship (12 months)
jobs.job_description: People Analytics Graduated Internship (12 months). Corporate. Working Student & Intern. Madrid, Spain. Celonis is the global leader in Process Intelligence. As a Working Student within the Data Analytics & Transformation Team, you will focus on the people data domain, helping unlock insights that improve the internal workforce experience. You will collaborate with HR business partners, analyze attrition and engagement data, build dashboards in Tableau, and support quarterly workforce planning. This is a 12-month paid internship for recent graduates. Requirements: Bachelor's or Master's degree (recently graduated), experience with SQL and Python, familiarity with HR analytics concepts, fluent English, Spanish is a plus.

ground_truth.notes: Explicit internship for recent graduates — too junior. Agent scored 98 — catastrophic false positive.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager — Developer Experience
jobs.job_description: Senior Product Manager — Developer Experience. Munich Hybrid (3 days onsite). JetBrains creates tools that make software development a more productive and enjoyable experience. We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to own the developer experience vision for IntelliJ IDEA and our broader IDE ecosystem used by 15M+ developers worldwide. In this role you will define and drive the product roadmap for core IDE workflows, conduct continuous discovery with developers through interviews and usage data, write detailed PRDs, partner with engineering teams across Munich and Prague, and present strategy to leadership. What you bring: 7+ years product management experience, deep empathy for developer workflows, experience with developer tools or B2D products, strong analytical and communication skills, fluent English required (German is a plus). We offer a collaborative environment, flexible hybrid work, and the opportunity to shape tools used by millions.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — developer tools PM in Munich hybrid. Excellent match for candidate profile.

jobs.title: Group Product Manager — Growth & Activation
jobs.job_description: Group Product Manager — Growth & Activation. Remote (EU timezone). Typeform is on a mission to bring people closer through better conversations. Our products are used by 150,000+ businesses to create forms, surveys, and interactive experiences. We're looking for a Group PM to lead our Growth squad and own the activation and expansion funnel for Typeform's self-serve B2C business. You will define the growth strategy, run experiments, own the onboarding experience, and manage two PM reports. What you bring: 8+ years in product management with at least 2 years leading growth or PLG initiatives, deep understanding of activation funnels and A/B testing, experience with B2C SaaS, strong data intuition (SQL a plus), excellent written and verbal English. Remote-first culture with async collaboration across EU timezones.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — B2C growth PM, remote EU. Good match.

jobs.title: Principal Product Manager — Platform
jobs.job_description: Principal Product Manager — Platform. Berlin Hybrid or Remote EU. Contentful is the leading content platform powering digital experiences for brands like Spotify, Urban Outfitters, and Intercom. We're hiring a Principal PM to own our Platform products — the APIs, SDKs, and extensibility surfaces used by 30,000+ developers. You will set the long-term platform vision, align cross-functional stakeholders across engineering, design, and go-to-market, conduct deep customer research with technical users, and mentor junior PMs. What you bring: 10+ years product management, experience with developer-facing APIs or platform products, ability to engage credibly with both technical and business audiences, exceptional written communication, fluent English required.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — principal PM, platform + developer tools, Berlin/Remote EU.

jobs.title: Director of Product — B2C Mobile

jobs.title: Junior Product Manager

jobs.title: Our Product Team — How We Build
jobs.job_description: Our Product Team — How We Build. At Pitch, our product team is at the heart of everything we do. We believe great products are built through empathy, curiosity, and tight collaboration with engineering and design. Our team of 12 product managers works across three squads: Core Editor, Collaboration, and Growth. We hold weekly all-hands, practice continuous discovery, and ship every two weeks. Meet some of our PMs and learn about life on the Pitch product team. Want to join us? Browse our open positions below.

ground_truth.notes: Culture/team page — not a job listing.

jobs.title: Life at Miro — Berlin Office
jobs.job_description: Life at Miro — Berlin Office. What's it like to work at Miro in Berlin? Our Berlin hub is home to 200+ Mironeers spanning engineering, product, design, and operations. We have a beautiful office in Mitte with open collaboration spaces, a rooftop terrace, and a fully stocked kitchen. We celebrate our team with quarterly offsites, team lunches, and regular learning sessions. Our benefits include 30 days vacation, top-tier health insurance, €100/month learning stipend, and an annual travel allowance. If you're looking for your next role at Miro, check out our open positions. We'd love to have you join us.

ground_truth.notes: Culture page / office spotlight — not a job listing.

jobs.title: Product Blog — Discovery at Scale: How We Run 100 User Interviews a Month
jobs.job_description: Discovery at Scale: How We Run 100 User Interviews a Month. Published by Typeform Product Team, March 2025. At Typeform, continuous discovery is baked into how every product squad operates. In this post, our Principal PM shares how we structure weekly discovery calls, synthesize insights into opportunity trees, and connect user evidence to roadmap decisions. We run approximately 100 user interviews per month across our PM team of 15. Here's the playbook we've developed over three years. Key principles: schedule interviews in advance, use structured guides with room for exploration, share recordings asynchronously, and update your opportunity tree weekly.

ground_truth.notes: Blog post about product discovery process — not a job listing.

jobs.title: Technical Program Manager — Platform Engineering
jobs.job_description: Technical Program Manager — Platform Engineering. Munich, Germany (Hybrid). Celonis is looking for a Technical Program Manager to drive delivery for our platform engineering organization. You will orchestrate cross-team dependencies, own the program-level roadmap, run steering committees, track milestones, and remove blockers to help 8 engineering teams ship faster. You will partner closely with Engineering Directors and VPs of Engineering. Requirements: 6+ years in technical program management or engineering management, experience driving large cross-functional technical programs, strong stakeholder management skills, ability to break down complex dependencies, fluent English, PMP or PMI-ACP a plus.

ground_truth.notes: Technical Program Manager — PM_SIGNAL matches 'program manager'. Borderline: candidate has strong delivery/roadmap skills that transfer. Should pass filters and likely score moderately high.

jobs.title: Chief of Staff to CPO
jobs.job_description: Chief of Staff to CPO. Berlin, Germany (Hybrid). N26 is Europe's leading mobile bank. We're looking for a Chief of Staff to support the Chief Product Officer in running the product organization efficiently. You will own the product leadership operating rhythm (OKR process, all-hands, leadership team meetings), drive strategic initiatives assigned by the CPO, prepare board and investor materials related to product, and serve as a force multiplier for the CPO's priorities. You will be a product leader in your own right, expected to have opinions and drive decisions. Requirements: 8+ years in product management or strategy consulting, deep product management expertise, exceptional written and verbal communication, ability to influence without authority, experience at a senior level.

ground_truth.notes: Chief of Staff to CPO — not caught by any filter (no PM_SIGNAL keyword but also no WRONG_FUNCTION). High-leverage role that should appeal to a senior PM. Likely scores high on LLM evaluation.

jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager — Developer Products
jobs.job_description: Product Marketing Manager — Developer Products. Remote Europe. Twilio powers communications for 300,000+ businesses. We're looking for a Product Marketing Manager to own the positioning and go-to-market strategy for our developer-facing APIs. You will craft messaging and positioning, partner with product management on launches, create developer-focused content, run competitive analysis, enable the sales team, and measure marketing metrics. Requirements: 5+ years in product marketing for developer products, excellent written communication in English, experience with content marketing and developer evangelism, understanding of API products.

ground_truth.notes: Product Marketing Manager — "developer" in subtitle matches WRONG_FUNCTION regex (developer role keyword). Effectively filtered correctly, albeit for the wrong word.

jobs.title: Scrum Master / Agile Coach
jobs.job_description: Scrum Master / Agile Coach. Munich, Germany (Hybrid). Siemens Digital Industries is transforming industrial automation with software. We're looking for a Scrum Master / Agile Coach to facilitate multiple agile teams and support the product organization in adopting agile at scale. jobs.title: Product Operations Manager
jobs.job_description: Product Operations Manager. Amsterdam Hybrid or Remote EU. Miro is the visual collaboration platform used by 70M+ users. We're looking for a Product Operations Manager to build the operating system for the product organization. You will design and run the OKR process, build dashboards tracking product KPIs, own the product tooling stack, standardize how squads run discovery and delivery, and serve as the central connective tissue between product, engineering, and business. Requirements: 5+ years in product operations, program management, or product management, strong analytical skills, experience building operational frameworks, excellent written communication.

jobs.title: Senior Program Manager — Product Delivery
jobs.job_description: Senior Program Manager — Product Delivery. Berlin, Germany (Hybrid). Zalando is Europe's leading fashion platform. We're looking for a Senior Program Manager to orchestrate delivery of our 2-year technology transformation program spanning 20+ teams. You will maintain the master program plan, manage dependencies, run governance processes, track risks and issues, and report to C-level stakeholders. ground_truth.notes: Program Manager (delivery/governance focus) — PM_SIGNAL matches 'program manager' so passes WRONG_FUNCTION check. LLM should score low as it's delivery management, not product management.

jobs.title: IT Product Manager — Internal Tools
jobs.job_description: IT Product Manager — Internal Tools. Munich, Germany (Hybrid). BMW Group is driving the future of mobility. Our Digital IT team is looking for an IT Product Manager to own our internal developer tooling platform used by 15,000 software engineers. You will define the roadmap for CI/CD tools, developer portals, and internal APIs, gather requirements from internal stakeholders, collaborate with IT architecture, and drive adoption of the developer platform. Requirements: 5+ years in IT product management or business analysis, experience with developer tools or internal platform products, strong stakeholder management, fluent German and English required.

ground_truth.notes: IT Product Manager for internal developer tools — PM_SIGNAL would match if title had 'product manager'. Title contains 'it product manager' — 'it manager' is in WRONG_FUNCTION but PM_SIGNAL should override. Borderline positive: developer tools domain is a good match.

jobs.title: Product Owner — Core Banking
jobs.job_description: Product Owner — Core Banking. Frankfurt, Germany (Hybrid). DZ Bank is Germany's second largest bank and central institution for the Volksbanken Raiffeisenbanken cooperative banking group. We're looking for a Product Owner to drive the digital transformation of our core banking platform. You will manage the product backlog, write user stories, facilitate agile ceremonies, collaborate with business stakeholders and external vendors, and ensure on-time delivery of regulatory and business-driven features. Requirements: 4+ years as Product Owner in financial services, CSPO or equivalent certification, experience with banking regulation (PSD2, Basel III), fluent German required.

ground_truth.notes: Product Owner at a conservative bank — PM_SIGNAL matches 'product owner'. Passes all filters. LLM should score lower: it's a technical PO role in traditional banking, not the B2C/developer-tools domain. Heavily regulation-focused.

jobs.title: IT Manager — Digital Workplace
jobs.job_description: IT Manager — Digital Workplace. Munich, Germany (Hybrid). Siemens is looking for an IT Manager to lead our Digital Workplace team responsible for Microsoft 365, collaboration tools, endpoint management, and IT support for 5,000 Munich-based employees. You will manage a team of 8 IT specialists, run IT projects, handle vendor relationships, manage the IT budget, and ensure service-level agreements are met. Requirements: 8+ years in IT management, deep Microsoft 365 expertise, experience managing IT teams, ITIL certification preferred, fluent German and English.

ground_truth.notes: IT Manager — 'it manager' is in WRONG_FUNCTION regex.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager — Checkout & Payments
jobs.job_description: Senior Product Manager — Checkout & Payments. Berlin, Germany (Hybrid). SumUp powers payments for 4M+ merchants worldwide. We're looking for a Senior PM to own the checkout and payment flow — the most critical touchpoint in the merchant and customer experience. You will define the roadmap for new payment methods, improve conversion through continuous discovery, partner with engineering and compliance, and drive our checkout success rate. What you bring: 6+ years product management, experience with payments or fintech products, strong analytical skills, ability to navigate regulatory requirements, excellent written communication.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — Senior PM in fintech/payments, Berlin hybrid.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager — B2C Subscription
jobs.job_description: Senior Product Manager — B2C Subscription. Remote Europe. Headspace is a global leader in mental wellness, helping millions of people sleep better, stress less, and be more mindful. We're looking for a Senior PM to own our subscription experience — the pricing, packaging, trial funnel, and renewal flow that drives our business. You will run continuous discovery with subscribers, define A/B tests, collaborate with engineering and data science, and improve subscriber lifetime value. What you bring: 6+ years in product management with subscription or monetization focus, strong data-driven approach, experience with consumer apps, excellent English, EU timezone required.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — B2C subscription PM, remote EU. Matches candidate background well.

jobs.title: Group Product Manager — Enterprise Platform
jobs.job_description: Group Product Manager — Enterprise Platform. Munich, Germany (Hybrid). Celonis is the global leader in Process Intelligence. We're looking for a Group PM to lead our enterprise platform squad — the APIs, integrations, and administration features used by our largest Fortune 500 customers. You will manage 2 PM reports, define the platform roadmap, conduct discovery with enterprise IT leaders, and align with engineering and pre-sales on technical requirements. What you bring: 9+ years product management, experience with enterprise SaaS platforms, ability to engage both technical and business stakeholders, excellent written and verbal communication, fluent English required.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — Group PM, enterprise platform, Munich hybrid.

jobs.title: Director of Product Management — B2B Platform
jobs.job_description: Director of Product Management — B2B Platform. Munich, Germany (Hybrid). Personio is the leading HR software for European SMEs, serving 14,000+ customers. We're looking for a Director of PM to lead our Platform domain — the APIs, integrations, and workflow automation features that let customers and partners build on top of Personio. You will manage a team of 4 PMs, define the 3-year platform vision, own the integration marketplace roadmap, and collaborate with engineering leadership. What you bring: 10+ years product management with at least 3 years leading PM teams, deep experience with B2B SaaS platforms or API products, excellent leadership and communication skills, fluent German preferred.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — Director of Product, B2B platform, Munich hybrid.

jobs.title: Principal Product Manager — AI & Automation
jobs.job_description: Principal Product Manager — AI & Automation. Remote Europe. Zapier helps millions of people automate work across 6,000+ apps. We're looking for a Principal PM to define the next generation of AI-powered automation for Zapier. You will own the AI product roadmap, conduct continuous discovery with power users, collaborate with our ML team, define the north star for AI agents in Zapier, and drive adoption metrics. What you bring: 9+ years product management, experience with AI/ML product features, strong user research background including Jobs-to-be-Done methodology, excellent async written communication for our remote-first culture, EU timezone required.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — Principal PM, AI/automation, remote EU. Matches candidate's continuous discovery and B2D expertise.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager — Core Experience
jobs.job_description: Senior Product Manager — Core Experience. Remote Europe (Munich preferred). Duolingo has 100M+ active learners. We're looking for a Senior PM to own the daily practice experience — the lessons, streaks, and gamification that drives our industry-leading retention. You will partner with ML engineers on personalized learning paths, run continuous discovery with learners, iterate on core engagement loops, and drive DAU and streak metrics. What you bring: 7+ years product management in consumer apps, deep understanding of engagement and habit formation, experience running experiments at scale, passion for education or language learning, excellent English, German a plus.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — B2C consumer app PM, remote EU with Munich preference. Excellent match.

jobs.title: Head of Product — Developer Tools
jobs.job_description: Head of Product — Developer Tools. Remote Europe. GitLab is the DevSecOps platform used by 30M+ developers. We're looking for a Head of Product to lead our Developer Tools stage — the IDE extensions, CLI, and local development experience across all GitLab products. You will manage a team of 4 PMs, define the developer tooling strategy, engage with our open-source community, conduct discovery with enterprise engineering teams, and influence the technical roadmap. What you bring: 10+ years product management with 3+ years in a leadership role, deep expertise in developer tools or developer experience, excellent written communication for async-first culture, ability to engage credibly with developers.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — Head of Product, developer tools, remote EU. Excellent match for candidate's developer tools background.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager — Data Products
jobs.job_description: Senior Product Manager — Data Products. Berlin, Germany (Hybrid). Adjust is the world's leading mobile measurement and analytics platform, trusted by thousands of apps. We're looking for a Senior PM to own our data and analytics products — the dashboards, reports, and data pipelines that help mobile marketers measure and optimize their campaigns. You will define the roadmap for data visualization features, conduct discovery with CMOs and growth marketers, collaborate with data engineering, and drive product-led growth. What you bring: 6+ years product management, experience with data or analytics products, strong user research skills, ability to translate complex data concepts into intuitive UX, excellent English.

ground_truth.notes: Strong positive — Senior PM, data/analytics products, Berlin hybrid. Good match.
